name: contribgraph
title: contribgraph
description: A GitHub-style contribution graph of a Wikipedia user's edit history (an edits-per-day heatmap), built on the MediaWiki usercontribs API.
keywords: wikipedia, edits, contributions, contribution graph, heatmap, usercontribs, visualization
_comment: license intentionally omitted: upstream NickSto/wikihistory is unlicensed; resolve license with upstream before declaring one. See README.
